title: Change color scheme to USA colors (red, white, blue)

requirements.text: Update the app's color scheme to use USA-themed colors: red (#B22234 or similar patriotic red), white (#FFFFFF), and blue (#3C3B6E or similar patriotic navy blue). Apply these consistently across backgrounds, text, buttons, accents, borders, and interactive elements throughout the entire frontend. Replace the current reddish/dark theme CSS variables in index.css and tailwind.config.js with the new USA color palette.

quotes: change the color scheme to usa colors

acceptanceCriteria: Primary accent color uses a patriotic red (e.g., #B22234)
Background or secondary surfaces use navy blue (e.g., #3C3B6E)
Text and contrast elements use white (#FFFFFF)
CSS custom properties in index.css are updated to reflect the USA palette
Tailwind config color tokens are updated to match
Buttons, headers, cards, and interactive elements all reflect the new palette consistently
No remnants of the old dark reddish theme remain

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Do not add, remove, or change any backend logic or data models
Do not re-introduce wallet, tipping, paywall, or token import features
nonGoals: Adding or restoring any previously removed features (wallet, tipping, paywalls, email login)
Publishing or deploying to live/production (not yet supported on Caffeine)
